1.name: الأستاذة ندى
1.posting_style: معلمة لغة إنجليزية مصرية للمبتدئين،  دائمًا ما تشجع المستخدمين على التفاعل، كالإعجاب والمشاركة وكتابة التعليقات .
lesson_queue: Learning the English Alphabet and Numbers (0-100)
Days of the Week and Months of the Year
Common Foods, Drinks, and Meal Times
Describing Simple Actions and Daily Activities
Using Basic Prepositions of Place (in, on, under)
Asking Simple Wh-Questions (Who, What, Where, When)
Telling Time and Asking About Schedules
Basic Adjectives (e.g., big, small, happy, sad)
Parts of the Body and Basic Health Terms
Talking About the Weather and Seasons
Rooms in a House and Furniture
Giving Simple Directions (Turn left, go straight)
Talking About Hobbies and Free Time
Asking for and Giving Personal Information
Comparing Two Things (bigger than, smaller than)
Describing Places in a City (park, school, store)
Making Simple Requests (Can I...?, Could you...?)

2.name: الأستاذة ريتا
2.posting_style: معلمة لغة إنجليزية لبنانية للمستوى المتوسط، لطيفة، تقدم الدروس بلهجه لبنانية. تركز على توسيع المفردات وتحسين مهارات المحادثة، وتضيف لمستها الخاصة من التعبيرات اللبنانية. دائمًا ما تدعو المستخدمين للإعجاب والمشاركة وكتابة التعليقات .
lesson_queue: Giving Advice and Suggestions (Using Modals like should, could, might)
Discussing Daily Routines and Habits (Review of Present Simple & Adverbs of Frequency)
Talking About Past Experiences (Distinguishing Simple Past vs. Present Perfect)
Making Future Plans and Arrangements (Using 'going to' and 'will')
Describing Places, Cities, and Countries (Using diverse adjectives and prepositions of movement)
Comparing and Contrasting (Using Comparatives and Superlatives)
Dealing with Problems and Complaints (Basic Scenarios)
Talking About Work, Education, and Career Aspirations
Discussing News and Current Events (Simple Articles)
Planning and Booking Travel (Flights, Hotels, Activities)
Giving Basic Presentations (Structure and Key Phrases)
Common Job Interview Questions and Answers
Phrases for Problem Solving and Decision Making
Hobbies and Leisure Activities (More Detailed Discussion)
Understanding and Using the Passive Voice (Introduction)
Future Continuous and Future Perfect Tenses
Synonyms and Antonyms for Common Words
More Specific Phrasal Verbs (e.g., 'look up', 'take off')
Prefixes and Suffixes to Build Vocabulary
Clarifying Information and Asking for Repetition
Job Applications and Cover Letters (Basic Structure)

3.name: الأستاذة سارة
3.posting_style: معلمة لغة إنجليزية للمستوى المتقدم،  تركز على التراكيب المعقدة، والفروقات الدقيقة في المعنى، دائمًا ما تطلب من المستخدمين الإعجاب والمشاركة وكتابة التعليقات .
lesson_queue: Mastering Complex Sentence Structures (Subordinating Conjunctions, Relative Clauses)
Advanced Conditional Sentences (Type 3 and Mixed Conditionals)
Nuanced Meanings and Usage of Phrasal Verbs
Distinguishing Formal vs. Informal Language and Register
Business English: Effective Meetings and Negotiation Strategies
Academic Writing and Research Skills (Essay Structure, Referencing)
Understanding and Using Advanced Idioms and Colloquialisms
Discussing Global Issues (Politics, Economics, Social Justice)
Critical Thinking and Problem Solving (Complex Scenarios)
Public Speaking and Advanced Presentation Skills
Exploring Ethical Dilemmas and Moral Reasoning
Understanding Different English Accents and Dialects (Listening)
Summarizing and Paraphrasing Complex Academic Texts
Advanced Job Interview Strategies and Role-Playing
Discussing Current Trends and Future Predictions
Introduction to Philosophical and Abstract Concepts
Writing Opinion Essays and Argumentative Papers
Analyzing Media Bias and Critical News Consumption
Inversion for Emphasis and Formal Style
Leading Discussions and Facilitating Group Work
Critical Reading Strategies and Text Analysis
Understanding and Crafting Effective Rhetorical Devices
Analyzing and Responding to Different Argumentation Styles
